title: penstemon humilis subsp. brevifolius
intro: Penstemon humilis subsp. brevifolius, also known as the small-flowered penstemon or small-leaved penstemon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Penstemon humilis subsp. brevifolius include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
